title: Creaky Doors
description: Doors with hinges and trapdoors with handles
body:
![Cover image featuring title, description, doors and a trapdoor with sparkles around them](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a481d29b9fa78e1105062ca4ea001ab0f75c31c4_0.webp)

## About
This resource pack improves the appearance of doors and trapdoors by tweaking their models and textures. It fixes consistency issues, improves the visuals of double doors and adds shading to trapdoors to make them look better when placed next to a door. It also supports mods the current list of which you can find down below.

## Features
### Doors
- Updated door textures
- Added separate textures for door's sides
- Added separate textures for doors placed on the left and right
- Added 3D item models for doors
- Improved hinges appearance and visibility
- Improved color and texture consistency
  
### Trapdoors
- Updated trapdoor textures
- Added separate textures for trapdoor's sides
- Added handles to trapdoors that didn't have them
- Added shading similar to that of the door’s textures
- Added separate textures for trapdoors opened upwards and downwards
- Improved color and texture consistency

## Compatibility
- [Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild) by FrozenBlock
